renames.rationale: Calls __std_exception_copy with many varied callers; classic C++ std::exception-derived constructor copying message string.
Second std::exception-style constructor (calls __std_exception_copy + FUN_14002f160) with distinct caller set from 140001a40, likely different derived class.
Small leaf calling only __std_exception_copy; shape of an exception copy constructor.
4-instruction leaf, no callers/callees, no strings; likely a tiny inline accessor or stub.
Sole callee is _guard_dispatch_icall; CFG-guarded indirect call thunk pattern.
Tiny 5-instruction leaf invoked by FUN_140001fc0 (a _CxxThrowException site); likely a small param-setup helper for the throw.
5-instruction leaf with single caller FUN_140002cd0; no strings; insufficient signal for semantic name.
Large 109-instruction method called via vtable (guard_dispatch_icall) by several wrappers (140001ee0/140001e20); likely a virtual method but no string anchor.
Forwards into FUN_140001c20 with setup via FUN_14002f180/FUN_1400106a0; thin invocation wrapper used at throw site FUN_140001fc0.
Second wrapper around FUN_140001c20 with identical callee set as 140001e20 but different caller pair, sibling invocation path.
Builds object via FUN_140001e20 and FUN_140001be0 then calls _CxxThrowException; canonical C++ throw helper.
Standalone routine whose only library call is __std_exception_copy; another std::exception-derived constructor.
Same shape as 140002000 (calls only __std_exception_copy), distinct address/size suggests another derived-exception constructor.
Two-instruction leaf returning literal string "generic"; MSVC std::generic_category::name() override.
Calls FUN_14002d7d0 and FUN_1400106a0 (same pair used by iostream-error builder 140002160); likely a sibling message-formatting helper.
Small 11-instruction routine whose only callee is FUN_14002f180; likely a thin forwarder/initializer.
Two-instruction leaf returning literal string "iostream"; MSVC std::iostream_category::name() override.
References string "iostream stream error" and calls the same helpers as 1400020d0; std::iostream_category::message() implementation.
